= Ruy Lopez: Exchange Variation =
The best move for white here is 6.Qxd4. This leads to 6.- Qxd4 7.Nxd4. This line is thought to slightly favor black.
6.Nxd4?! is bad because of 6.- c5! and after 7.Nb5 or 7.Nb3, black shall play Qxd1+!, which will give him an advantage.
